docs:
# Infinite Moving Cards
A testimonial rail built on top of the marquee primitive.
## Import
```tsx
import { InfiniteMovingCards } from "@/components/ui/infinite-moving-cards";
```
## Usage
```tsx
"use client";


<InfiniteMovingCards reverse={false} duration="40s" panelHeight={undefined} />
```
## Props
- **reverse** (boolean) — default: `false`: Reverse
- **duration** (number) — default: `40`: Duration (s)
- **panelHeight** (number): Panel height
> Requires `"use client"` in the file that renders this component.
Some Aurora UI components use custom Tailwind animations (animate-shimmer, animate-marquee, animate-aurora, etc.). Merge keyframes from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/main/tailwind.config.ts into your tailwind.config.
## Install
```bash
npx --yes github:Rydaguy101/aurora-ui add infinite-moving-cards
# or with shadcn CLI (after aurora-ui init):
npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/infinite-moving-cards
```
